name: PHASE-36 C3 (STEP A): createPolicy fails fast in PROMPT control mode with no respond surface; opt-in + TEST + WORKSPACE_WRITE do NOT throw
_phase36_note: PROMPT mode has no respond surface wired (no /api/permission/* endpoints), so a real PROMPT boot would stall every gated op for DEFAULT_TIMEOUT_MS then DENY. createPolicy now throws at construction unless prompt_respond_surface:true is passed (the future-proof opt-in the self-test harness uses for its auto-deny prompter). TEST control mode and the data modes are unaffected.
